copy.choose_all_the_odd_numbers_on_the_path: Choose all the odd numbers on the path
copy.prompt_skip_forward: Start at {start}. Add {step} each step. Choose the numbers in order.
copy.prompt_skip_backward: Start at {start}. Subtract {step} each step. Choose the numbers in order.
copy.prompt_arithmetic_ascending: Start at {start} and add {step} each step. Choose the numbers in order.
copy.prompt_arithmetic_descending: Start at {start} and subtract {step} each step. Choose the numbers in order.
copy.prompt_arithmetic_missing: Complete the sequence. Choose the missing numbers in order.
copy.prompt_geometric_sequence: Start at {start} and multiply by {ratio} each step. Choose the numbers in order.
